headline: Jones Lang Q1 Earnings Beat Estimates on Leasing Advisory-Led Growth
summary: JLL beat Q1 2026 earnings estimates as Leasing Advisory and Capital Markets drive double-digit revenue growth across key markets and service lines.

raw.headline: Jones Lang Q1 Earnings Beat Estimates on Leasing Advisory-Led Growth
raw.summary: JLL beat Q1 2026 earnings estimates as Leasing Advisory and Capital Markets drive double-digit revenue growth across key markets and service lines.

headline: New York Life Investment Management to Update Fund Lineup Branding
summary: NEW YORK, May 01, 2026--New York Life Investment Management ("NYLIM") today announced that, effective Aug. 28, 2026, its U.S. Retail investment products will be renamed to reflect the new brand launched earlier this year.

raw.headline: New York Life Investment Management to Update Fund Lineup Branding
